pi_items.source: Task description (line 5) states 'Create a new layer named SAFETY'
DXF AutoCAD Color Index (ACI) standard: code 1 = Red (verified via ezdxf and AutoCAD documentation: https://ezdxf.readthedocs.io/en/stable/concepts/aci.html)
Task description states: 'starting at (300, 300), going to (300, 600), and ending at the exit at (800, 600)'
Task description: 'A 50x50 Square' with 'corners at 475,275 and 525,325' (verified: 500±25 = [475,525] and 300±25 = [275,325])
Task description: 'Add text YOU ARE HERE near the circle, EXIT near the route end, and FE near the square'

privileged_info_summary: Task uses a real architectural DXF floorplan (1.1MB AutoCAD 2004 format) downloaded from https://github.com/jscad/sample-files. The task requires drawing safety elements on a new 'SAFETY' layer with color code 1 (Red): an evacuation route with points (300,300)→(300,600)→(800,600), a circular 'You Are Here' marker at (300,300) with radius 25, a 50×50 square fire extinguisher symbol centered at (500,300), and three text labels ('YOU ARE HERE', 'EXIT', 'FE'). All metadata specifications are mathematically consistent with the task description and conform to DXF standards.
